headline: Data Analyst at the University of St. Thomas, pursuing a Master’s in Data Science with strong expertise in SQL, Python, Power BI, and data analytics. Oracle SQL Certified with 5+ years of experience delivering data-driven solutions using ETL processes, Agile methodologies, and SDLC practices. Combines analytical thinking with engineering fundamentals to transform data into actionable insights. Highly adaptable, collaborative, and focused on building scalable, reliable, and business-impacting solutions.
